name: Icebox Angel Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. Crumble angel food cake into a 9x13 inch glass pan.
2. Melt marshmallows with milk.
3. Spoon the melted marshmallow mixture over the crumbled cake.
4. Spoon pineapple over top.
5. Add chopped cherries.
6. Spread Cool Whip over all.
7. Sprinkle with coconut.
8. Refrigerate.
